race.description: Weir's IGA + Liquor Donald Mdn Plate
race.comment: Might be worthwhile giving STARBURST (11) another chance if a couple of recent jumpouts are anything to go by. Has won the two she has had since the debut run, when not a lot went right, and she looked to have a bit in hand in each of them. Speaking of nice jumpouts, POSTCARDS (8) sizzled in the one she won back in April then ran a close second in another before going to the line untested at the latest. She can give a sight. LOTS OF TORQUE (7) wasn't beaten far first-up in a maiden at the Swan Hill carnival and if she's taken any improvement from that she's a major player. CODENAME (1) wasn't beaten far last start by a horse who has been whisked straight off to Flemington, which was the first start for the stable and he should be ready for a peak performance.
